race.description: Maclean Bowling Club Maclean Cup Day 19 July (Bm82)
race.comment: STATE IN TEXAS (2) not too sure where his ceiling is as he chases his fourth-straight victory. Worth noting he's yet to win over 1000m and gets his chance today to tick that box fourth-up. Expected to go close. PIXIE HALLOW (5) was a month between runs when he faded badly in the straight to run seventh over 1000m at Taree. Won over this track and trip two-back and strips fitter with the sharp drop in weight with Gorton's 3kg claim. Among the top chances. VEECEE (8) massive drop in class when he scored a long overdue victory over this trip at Taree as fav. Confidence is high but must overcome the wide draw. Respect. BJORN IRONSIDE (9) fitter now third-up and will appreciate the weight relief after he closed strongly to run third over 1100m at Port Macquarie. Warrants serious consideration.
